MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on WED-MAR-13-2013:
Plaintiff RAYMOND GRINSELL is present with Attorney Brenda Cruz Keith
Defendant ELIAS M. PAREDES is present with Attorney Masayo Nobe representing the defendant though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem James Birkelund, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 502B for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is filed. The trial date of MAR-18-2013 is vacated.
